sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n43722" key="eu)ei/deia" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">εὐείδ-εια</orth> or <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">εὐειδ-ία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n43722.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">good looks</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0649.tlg001:2:7" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Lesb.Rh.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.7</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0654.tlg002:15" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Corn.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">ND</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">15</biblScope> </bibl> (<xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.l.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">εὐήδεια</ref> </xr>).</sense> </entryFree>
